name: sn74169 Up/Down Counter
description: A 4-bit synchronous up/down counter (TTL 74169 replica) with parallel load, hold, and active-low ripple-carry out, adapted from a Tiny Tapeout Apache-2.0 project, taken spec -> lint -> simulation -> GDS on sky130hd entirely through the platform.
highlights: Full flow to GDSII on sky130hd (OpenROAD/ORFS)
Timing met: WNS 0.0 ns; 26 std cells; 283 um2
Self-checking TB (golden model of load/count/hold + RCOB terminal pulse) PASSED
source_note: RTL core adapted from Tiny Tapeout andychip1/sn74169 (Apache-2.0, commit cdab2c2); original self-checking TB; authored by dogfooding SiliconCrew locally (native iverilog sim + local ORFS synth).
